sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21447" key="galaktokra/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰλακτο-κράς</orth>, gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κρᾶτος</foreign>, <sense id="n21447.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with milk</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.51</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:2:759" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.759</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
